data.headline: 40 Years Combined Experience. Emergency Service Available.
data.subhead: Family-owned plumbing and heating—boilers, furnaces, hot water tanks, drain cleaning, backflow testing.

items.title: Boiler & Furnace Service
items.description: System won't heat? We install, repair and service all makes of boilers and furnaces for Richmond homes.

items.title: Hot Water Tank Replacement
items.description: No hot water or leaking tank? Fast replacement and installation—same-day service when you need it most.

items.title: Drain Cleaning
items.description: Slow drain or backup? Camera inspection and line location to clear clogs and diagnose the root cause.

items.title: Backflow Testing
items.description: Required annual testing? Certified technicians handle all backflow prevention device inspections and compliance reporting.

items.title: Gas Fitting & BBQ Box
items.description: Need gas line work or BBQ hookup? Fully licensed gas fitters handle installation and service safely.

items.title: Camera Inspection & Excavation
items.description: Hidden line problem? Video inspection pinpoints issues—excavation only when necessary, saving you time and money.

data.headline: Family-Owned Richmond Business
data.narrative: J8 Plumbing & Heating is a locally owned family operation serving Richmond and the surrounding areas. With over 40 years of combined experience in plumbing, heating, and gas fitting, our fully certified technicians deliver quality workmanship on every job. We're committed to providing our community with honest service, transparent pricing, and reliable solutions—whether it's an emergency furnace breakdown or routine backflow testing. Technical Safety BC certified, we handle residential and commercial projects with the same hands-on attention to detail.

image.alt: J8 Plumbing & Heating technician working on plumbing system in Richmond

items.author: A R
items.text: J8 Plumbing are exceptional to work with! Honest, efficient & in general good-vibe type of people. I found JJ through our strata property manager. He was highly recommend based on some work he has done in our office building. I cannot express how happy & relieved I was after his visit. All his recommendations were spot on. He listened. I felt like I could trust him right away & that I wasn't getting the typical contractor run-around. Also their team dispatcher Jen is very efficient & responsive. I would hire them again in a heartbeat - 10/10!!!!

items.author: Maryann Wadge
items.text: J8 Plumbing is an excellent company.  Have dealt with them in our condo for quite a few years and have never had a negative experience.  They are prompt, reliable, courteous and service oriented.  The office staff is excellent and JJ the owner is hands on and never disappoints.  If you are looking for professional, timely, excellent service then J8 is the company you need.  Cannot say enough about their service.  All I can say is thankyou!

items.author: HTROP Holy Trinity Romanian
items.text:
We're incredibly grateful to J8 Plumbing and Heating for their exceptional HVAC work on our new church hall and apartment unit in Oct-Nov 2024. Not only did they deliver top-notch quality and meet the deadline, but they also made a generous donation and provided a discount, helping us save funds to advance our community hall project. It's inspiring to see a business so committed to giving back to the community. Thank you, J8, and we wish you a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!
- Holy Trinity Romanian Orthodox Parish, New Westminster, BC

items.author: Emily T
items.text:
J8 Plumbing was professional and easy to book, all the staff I spoke to were very friendly. They had a couple of emergencies (which is completely understandable), and needed to push the appointment back, they still managed to come that day and fix the issues quickly for a great price.

I will be using them again in the future, and would recommend them.

data.headline: Plumbing Emergency? Furnace Breakdown?
data.subhead: Call now for same-day service in Richmond—40 years of experience handling urgent repairs.
